requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India [Commercial Banks -
Kisan Credit Card (KCC) Scheme] Directions, 2026.
requirements.object: Bank of India [Commercial Banks - Kisan Credit Card (KCC) Scheme] Directions, 2026

requirements.full_sentence:
The Directions shall be applicable to loans sanctioned under the KCC Scheme with
effect from January 01, 2027.
requirements.object: sanctioned under the KCC Scheme with effect from January 01, 2027

requirements.full_sentence:
Loans sanctioned prior to the said date shall continue
to be governed by the extant guidelines till maturity / next renewal.
requirements.object: by the extant guidelines till maturity / next renewal

requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be applicable to all Commercial Banks (hereinafter
collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank')
For the purpose of these Directions, 'Commercial Banks' mean banking companies
(other than Small Finance Banks, Payment Banks, and Local Area Banks)
corresponding new banks, and the State Bank of India, as defined respectively under
clauses (c), (da) and (nc) of Section 5 of the Banking Regulation Act,1949.
requirements.object: Commercial Banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank') For the purpose of these Directio

requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall not be applicable to operations of overseas branches of
Indian banks.
requirements.object: of overseas branches of Indian banks

requirements.full_sentence:
For the purpose of these Directions, unless the context or subject otherwise
requires, the terms herein shall bear the meanings assigned to them as given below:
(1) "Crop season" means the period up to harvesting and marketing of the crops
raised.
requirements.object: to them as given below: (1) "Crop season" means the period up to harvesting and marketing of the crops raised

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) "Short duration crops" shall mean crops with anticipated duration from sowing to
marketing up to twelve months.
requirements.object: duration from sowing to marketing up to twelve months

requirements.full_sentence:
(4) For the purpose of the KCC Scheme, crop seasons shall be standardized at twelve
months for short duration crops and eighteen months for long duration crops.
requirements.object: months for short duration crops and eighteen months for long duration crops

requirements.full_sentence: (5) "Marginal farmer" means a farmer with landholding of up to one hectare.
requirements.object: of up to one hectare

requirements.full_sentence:
(6) "Small farmer" means a farmer with landholding of more than one hectare and up
to two hectares.
requirements.object: of more than one hectare and up to two hectares

requirements.full_sentence:
Words and expressions used herein and not defined in these Directions, but defined
in the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934, or the Banking Regulation Act, 1949, shall
have the meanings assigned to them in those Acts.
requirements.object: to them in those Acts

requirements.full_sentence:
Under the KCC Scheme, banks shall extend credit to eligible borrowers for their
farming and other needs as indicated below in the form of a composite facility with a
tenure of six years:
(1) Short term credit requirements for cultivation of crops;
requirements.object: borrowers for their farming and other needs as indicated below in the form of a composite facility with a tenure of six year

requirements.full_sentence:
The aggregate of components at (1) to (7) above shall form the short-term credit
limit portion of the composite facility and the component at (8) shall constitute the long-
term credit limit portion of the facility.
requirements.object: limit portion of the composite facility and the component at (8) shall constitute the long- term credit limit portion of th

requirements.full_sentence:
The short-term credit limit fixed for the sixth year together with the estimated long-
term credit limit shall be the Composite Maximum Permissible Limit (CMPL) and is to
be treated as the KCC limit.
requirements.object: Permissible Limit (CMPL) and is to be treated as the KCC limit

requirements.full_sentence:
The short-term component of the KCC limit for the purposes of crop cultivation and
allied activities shall be in the nature of revolving cash credit facility.
requirements.object: of revolving cash credit facility

requirements.full_sentence:
There shall be no
restriction on the number of debits and credits.
requirements.object: the number of debits and credits

requirements.full_sentence:
Eligibility
The following shall be eligible to avail credit for working capital requirements for
cultivation of crops:
(1) Farmers (individual / joint borrowers), who are owner cultivators;
requirements.object: credit for working capital requirements for cultivation of crops: (1) Farmers (individual / joint borrowers), who are owner culti

requirements.full_sentence:
Fixation of Drawing Limit
(1) The drawing limit for each crop season shall be the sum total of the following:
Note: Refer A (I), (II), (III) and (IV) of Illustrations 1 and 2 given in the Annex I.
requirements.object: of the following: Note: Refer A (I), (II), (III) and (IV) of Illustrations 1 and 2 given in the Annex I

requirements.full_sentence:
(7) Marginal farmers shall also be eligible for a flexible credit limit of ₹10,000 to
₹50,000 (as Flexi KCC) as per assessment of the bank without relating it to the value
of the land.
requirements.object: a flexible credit limit of ₹10,000 to ₹50,000 (as Flexi KCC) as per assessment of the bank without relating it to the value of th

requirements.full_sentence: The credit limit shall be based on crops grown, post-harvest warehouse
requirements.object: grown, post-harvest warehouse

conditions:
In case the cropping pattern adopted by the farmer changes for any subsequent
season
requirements.full_sentence:
(2) In case the cropping pattern adopted by the farmer changes for any subsequent
season, the drawing limit shall be reworked by taking into consideration the crops
proposed to be grown.
requirements.object: into consideration the crops proposed to be grown

conditions:
where the SoF has not been notified by SLTC for a particular crop
season
requirements.full_sentence:
(3) In situations where the SoF has not been notified by SLTC for a particular crop
season, at the time of the farmer availing the loan, the bank shall consider applying a
10 per cent notional hike over the SoF applicable for the previous season and
determine the drawable limit for the ensuing season.
requirements.object: per cent notional hike over the SoF applicable for the previous season and determine the drawable limit for the ensuing season

conditions:
where the
SoF has been notified but not revised
requirements.full_sentence:
However, in cases where the
SoF has been notified but not revised, banks shall adopt the existing SoF.

(4) In respect of crops not covered in the SoF finalised by the SLTC / DLTC of the
respective State, loans extended shall be outside the KCC framework.
requirements.object: framework

requirements.full_sentence:
However,
efforts must be made to get the SoF of such crops notified by the SLTC / DLTC.
requirements.object: the SoF of such crops notified by the SLTC / DLTC

requirements.full_sentence: (5) The KCC credit limit shall be rounded off to the nearest ₹1,000.
requirements.object: the nearest ₹1,000

requirements.full_sentence:
(6) At the time of sanction, the maximum permissible limit (MPL) for the short-term
crop loan shall be arrived at on a notional basis by adding 10 per cent to the limit of
the previous crop season, from the second crop season onwards.
requirements.object: a notional basis by adding 10 per cent to the limit of the previous crop season, from the second crop season onwards

conditions:
In case the drawing
limit exceeds the MPL in any crop season / year
requirements.full_sentence:
In case the drawing
limit exceeds the MPL in any crop season / year, the MPL shall be reassessed at the
time of review.
requirements.object: time of review

requirements.full_sentence:
Repayment Period
Banks shall fix the repayment period as per the crop season applicable.
requirements.object: as per the crop season applicable

requirements.full_sentence:
Eligibility
The following borrowers shall be eligible to avail credit for working capital requirements
for allied activities.
requirements.object: credit for working capital requirements for allied activities

requirements.full_sentence:
Fixation of Drawing Limit
(1) Banks shall fix the drawing limits for allied activities based on the SoF (as notified
by SLTC / DLTC) for the respective activities and number of units (acre / unit / animal
/ bird, etc.) by adopting the method analogous to that of working capital loans for
cultivation of crops as indicated at paragraph 13 above.
requirements.object: for allied activities based on the SoF (as notified by SLTC / DLTC) for the respective activities and number of units (acre / u

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) In respect of allied activities not covered in the SoF finalised by the SLTC / DLTC
of the respective State, loans extended shall be outside the KCC framework.
requirements.object: framework

requirements.full_sentence:
However,
efforts must be made to get the SoF of such allied activities notified by the SLTC /
DLTC.
requirements.object: the SoF of such allied activities notified by the SLTC / DLTC

conditions:
where a borrower avails credit for both crop cultivation and allied activities
under the KCC framework
requirements.full_sentence:
(3) In cases where a borrower avails credit for both crop cultivation and allied activities
under the KCC framework, the additional component towards consumption
requirements (10 per cent) shall be considered only once and shall not be reckoned
separately for each activity.
requirements.object: each activity

requirements.full_sentence:
Repayment Period
Banks shall fix the repayment period as per the cash flow / income generation pattern
of the activity undertaken by the borrower.
requirements.object: as per the cash flow / income generation pattern of the activity undertaken by the borrower

requirements.full_sentence:
Eligibility
Beneficiaries specified in paragraph 12 and 15 above shall be eligible to avail
investment credit for purposes related to agriculture and allied activities, illustratively:
(1) land development
(2) minor irrigation
(3) purchase of farm / fishing, etc., equipment
(4) construction of animal / bird shed
(5) purchase of livestock
(6) purchase of equipment related to allied activities, and
(7) similar other purposes
requirements.object: investment credit for purposes related to agriculture and allied activities, illustratively: (1) land development (2) minor irrig

requirements.full_sentence:
Fixation of Limit
(1) The term loan limit shall be based on the proposed investment(s) during the tenure
of the KCC facility and the bank's assessment of the repaying capacity of the borrower.
requirements.object: proposed investment(s) during the tenure of the KCC facility and the bank's assessment of the repaying capacity of the borrower

requirements.full_sentence: (2) The draw down of instalments shall be allowed based on the nature of investment.
requirements.object: the nature of investment

requirements.full_sentence:
Repayment Period
The term-loan component shall be repayable within a period of six years depending
on the type of activity / investment, as per the bank's credit policy applicable for
investment credit.
requirements.object: period of six years depending on the type of activity / investment, as per the bank's credit policy applicable for investment cr

conditions: If the nature of investment involves a tenure longer than six years
requirements.full_sentence:
If the nature of investment involves a tenure longer than six years,
the term loan may be treated as a separate facility outside the KCC framework.
requirements.object: separate facility outside the KCC framework

requirements.full_sentence:
The rate of interest shall be as stipulated in Reserve Bank of India (Commercial
Banks - Interest Rates on Advances) Directions, 2025 dated November 28, 2025, as
amended from time to time and as per other relevant guidelines issued in respect of
charging interest on agricultural advances.
requirements.object: Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Interest Rates on Advances) Directions, 2025 dated November 28, 2025, as amended from ti

requirements.full_sentence:
Banks shall pay interest on the minimum credit balance in KCC cash credit
accounts as stipulated in the Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Interest
Rate on Deposits) Directions, 2025 (Updated as on June 17, 2026), as amended from
time to time.
requirements.object: minimum credit balance in KCC cash credit accounts as stipulated in the Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Interest Rate on

requirements.full_sentence:
Banks shall waive collateral security and margin requirements for agricultural loans
including loans for allied activities up to ₹2 lakh per borrower.
requirements.object: margin requirements for agricultural loans including loans for allied activities up to ₹2 lakh per borrower

requirements.full_sentence:
Banks shall obtain and retain explicit declaration from the borrower
in such cases.
requirements.object: declaration from the borrower in such cases

requirements.full_sentence:
Banks shall decide the collateral security and margin requirements for loans above
₹2 lakh as per their credit policy and in adherence with RBI guidelines issued from
time to time.
requirements.object: and margin requirements for loans above ₹2 lakh as per their credit policy and in adherence with RBI guidelines issued

conditions:
In case of KCC loans against hypothecation of crops / stock and involving tie-up
arrangements for recovery
requirements.full_sentence:
In case of KCC loans against hypothecation of crops / stock and involving tie-up
arrangements for recovery, banks may waive collateral security for loans up to a limit
of ₹3 lakh.
requirements.object: loans up to a limit of ₹3 lakh

requirements.full_sentence:
Considering the different interest rates and repayment schedules applicable to
various types of credit provided under KCC, the facility may be divided into sub-limits
for short-term cash credit limit-cum-savings accounts for crop cultivation and allied
activities separately, and long-term loan for agriculture and allied activities.
requirements.object: for short-term cash credit limit-cum-savings accounts for crop cultivation and allied activities separately, and long-term

requirements.full_sentence:
For
<image>
operational convenience, these sub-limits shall be maintained as separate loan
accounts under the composite KCC facility.
requirements.object: loan accounts under the composite KCC facility

requirements.full_sentence:
Banks shall ensure ongoing monitoring of the end use of the credit facility by the
borrower as per the terms of sanction through field inspections and / or other means,
as per their credit policy.
requirements.object: the end use of the credit facility by the borrower as per the terms of sanction through field inspections and / or other

requirements.full_sentence:
Banks shall undertake review and renewal of the short-term limits for crop
cultivation and allied activities as per their credit policy.
requirements.object: of the short-term limits for crop cultivation and allied activities as per their credit policy

requirements.full_sentence:
Banks shall obtain a one-time documentation including land record / tenancy
certificate / equivalent certificate as per their credit policy at the time of application for
fresh loan.
requirements.object: including land record / tenancy certificate / equivalent certificate as per their credit policy at the time of applica

requirements.full_sentence:
During the tenure of the facility, at the time of each review, the bank shall
obtain declaration from the borrower(s) regarding proposed activity / activities.
requirements.object: borrower(s) regarding proposed activity / activities

conditions: In case of loans to sharecroppers and oral lessees
requirements.full_sentence:
In case of loans to sharecroppers and oral lessees, banks shall accept certificates
provided by local administration / panchayati raj institutions regarding the cultivation
of crops by such borrowers.
requirements.object: local administration / panchayati raj institutions regarding the cultivation of crops by such borrowers

requirements.full_sentence:
Where there are difficulties in getting certification
regarding identity and occupational status of sharecroppers and oral lessees, banks
shall accept an affidavit submitted by such borrowers giving their occupational status
(i.e., details of land tilled / crops grown), for loans up to ₹50,000.
requirements.object: by such borrowers giving their occupational status (i

requirements.full_sentence:
Processing fees, inspection charges and other charges shall be as per the bank's
policy on applicable charges and applicable regulatory guidelines, if any.
requirements.object: bank's policy on applicable charges and applicable regulatory guidelines

requirements.full_sentence:
The KCC holder will have the option to avail any type of crop insurance, asset
insurance, accident insurance (including Personal Accident Insurance Scheme) or
health insurance and may pay the premium through the KCC account.
requirements.object: the KCC account

requirements.full_sentence:
Beneficiaries
shall be made aware of the insurance covers available.
requirements.object: the insurance covers available

requirements.full_sentence:
Their explicit consent shall be
obtained, at the application stage itself if the premium is to be paid through the KCC
account.
requirements.object: application stage itself if the premium is to be paid through the KCC account

requirements.full_sentence:
In case insurance (crop insurance, asset insurance and personal accident
insurance) is funded under the KCC facility, the same shall be assigned in favour of
the lending bank.
requirements.object: of the lending bank

requirements.full_sentence:
Draw down of the limit shall be allowed as per the convenience of the farmer using
any of the following delivery channels:
(1) operation through banking outlet / part-time banking outlet (as defined in the
Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Branch Authorisation) Directions, 2025
dated November 28, 2025, as amended from time to time).
requirements.object: the convenience of the farmer using any of the following delivery channels: (1) operation through banking outlet / part-time banking

requirements.full_sentence:
Banks shall enable operations in KCC accounts through Unified Payments
Interface (for working capital credit), debit cards (as stipulated in Reserve Bank of India
(Commercial Banks - Credit Cards and Debit Cards: Issuance and Conduct)
Directions, 2025 dated November 28,2025, as amended from time to time), mobile
banking, internet banking, National Electronic Funds Transfer (NEFT), Real Time
Gross Settlement (RTGS), Central Bank Digital Currency (CBDC) or any other
regulated digital delivery channel, after obtaining explicit consent of the account
holder.
requirements.object: accounts through Unified Payments Interface (for working capital credit), debit cards (as stipulated in Reserve Bank of India

conditions: In case the farmer applies for loan against the warehouse receipt of the produce
requirements.full_sentence:
In case the farmer applies for loan against the warehouse receipt of the produce,
the bank shall consider such request as per established procedure and guidelines.
requirements.object: per established procedure and guidelines

requirements.full_sentence:
The loan extended to the farmer in such case shall be linked with the related short-
term KCC loan, if any, and the outstanding amount in such loan shall be adjusted at
the time of disbursal of the loan secured by warehouse receipt.
requirements.object: related short- term KCC loan

requirements.full_sentence:
Banks shall adhere to the instructions regarding interest subvention and prompt
repayment incentive on KCC loans, as applicable from time to time.
requirements.object: regarding interest subvention and prompt repayment incentive on KCC loans, as applicable from time to time

requirements.full_sentence:
Prudential norms on income recognition, asset-classification and provisioning as
stipulated in the Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Asset Classification,
Provisioning and Income Recognition) Directions, 2026 dated April 27, 2026, as
amended from time to time, shall apply to loans granted under the KCC Scheme.
requirements.object: under the KCC Scheme

requirements.full_sentence:
Banks shall submit data on KCC loans as per the prescribed reporting format, at
quarterly intervals, within 15 working days from the end of the quarter.
requirements.object: loans as per the prescribed reporting format, at quarterly intervals, within 15 working days from the end of the quarter

requirements.full_sentence:
The Directions, instructions, and guidelines repealed prior to the issuance of these
Directions shall continue to remain repealed.

Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken,
or initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall continue to
be governed by the provisions thereof.
requirements.object: by the provisions thereof

requirements.full_sentence:
All approvals or acknowledgements granted
under these repealed lists shall be deemed as governed by these Directions.
requirements.object: by these Directions

requirements.full_sentence:
Further,
the repeal of these Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall not in any way
prejudicially affect:
(1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder.,
(2) any, penalty, forfeiture, or punishment incurred in respect of any contravention
committed thereunder;
requirements.object: affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

requirements.full_sentence:
and any
such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted, continued, or
enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture, or punishment may be imposed as if those
Directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been repealed.
requirements.object: enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture, or punishment may be imposed as if those Directions, instructions, or guidelin

requirements.full_sentence:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation
of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations or Directions, for the time being
in force.
requirements.object: and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations or Directions, for the time being in force

requirements.full_sentence:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order
to remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these
Directions, the Reserve Bank may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary
clarifications in respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any
provision of these Directions given by the Reserve Bank shall be final and binding.

requirements.object: of Finance approved by the State Level Technical Committee for determining the KCC limit

Drawing limit for subsequent seasons
Year Calculation Drawing Limit#
1 Drawing Limit - 1st Cycle [(A) + (B)] ₹2,64,500 2 = ₹2,08,000 (SoF notified by SLTC × 1 unit involved) + 10% + 20% + ₹4,800 (Cost of insurance) ₹2,75,200
